data.title: 国际服主线Vol.4 第二章后篇更新
data.summary: [Main Story Notice] The Rabbit of Caerbannog Chapter 2: We Were RABBITs! Second Half episode is fina
data.body:
[Main Story Notice]

The Rabbit of Caerbannog Chapter 2: We Were RABBITs! Second Half episode is finally here.

What effect will the General Student Council's changes have on the Public Peace Bureau and, by extension, the whole of Kivotos?
